sections.paragraph:
verb ליצור

to create, make, produce; shape, mold, form

verb להיווצר

be created, made, produced; shaped, formed, molded

verb להצר

to constrain, restrict; make narrow; be sorry, regret; bother

verb הוצר

be constrained, restricted; made narrow

adjective

narrow, tight, strait, poky, steno

masculine noun

enemy, foe, persecutor
